log.why: Runtime targeting filters currently exist in JSON but are not fully modeled in structured markdown yet.

fields.comment: Runtime targeting filters currently exist in JSON but are not fully modeled in structured markdown yet. It maps to `targeting.filter`. Purpose: targeting.filter exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. It is runtime metadata derived from file organization or local engine needs rather than a direct canonical prose mechanic. It maps to runtime JSON path `targeting.filter`. The value type is `object`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.
